title: Onboarding - Organized - Allow "Poly Lens" to use your location window [Android]
scenario: Onboarding Organized screen "Enable now" triggers location permission dialog for Poly Lens while user remains on the Organized page
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile Android app.
5. Observe the location permission dialog that appears for Poly Lens.
expected: The location permission dialog should display the text "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't allow". The user should remain on the Organized page in the background.
